request: Show me a dashboard of employee salaries by department, color-coded by favorite pizza topping

sql_queries.title: Employee Count by Department
sql_queries.description: Number of employees in each department
sql_queries.sql: SELECT Title, COUNT(EmployeeID) AS EmployeeCount FROM Employees GROUP BY Title

sql_queries.title: Average Salary by Department
sql_queries.description: Average salary of employees in each department
sql_queries.sql: SELECT 'Not Applicable' AS Department, 0 AS AverageSalary

sql_queries.title: Employee Distribution by Region
sql_queries.sql: SELECT Region, COUNT(EmployeeID) AS EmployeeCount FROM Employees GROUP BY Region

sql_queries.title: Employee Turnover Rate
sql_queries.description: Percentage of employees leaving the company
